welcome:
👋 Hi {{name}}!

I'm *MediaFlow Bot* — your fast media assistant.

*What I can do:*
• 🎵 TikTok videos
• 📸 Instagram Reels
• 📘 Facebook public videos & Reels
• ▶️ YouTube audio & metadata

_Send me a link to begin._
help:
*How to use*

1. Copy a link from TikTok / Instagram / Facebook / YouTube
2. Paste it here
3. I'll fetch what's available

Use the menu below for more options.
about:
ℹ️ *MediaFlow Bot*

Version {{version}}.
premium:

support:

errors.tooLarge: ⚠️ File is too large for Telegram.
errors.rateLimit: ⏱ Too many requests. Slow down a moment.
